name: ruby-io-event
title: ruby-io-event
summary: low level primitives for constructing event loops
description:
low level primitives for constructing event loops
Provides low level cross-platform primitives for constructing event loops,
with support for `select`, `kqueue`, `epoll` and `io_uring`.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-io-event because low level primitives for constructing event loops.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-io-event as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-io-event with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-io-event --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
